title: Set up Lucia Auth v3 in a Next.js App Router project
summary: Full Lucia Auth v3 setup — adapter, session/user tables, cookie management, sign-up/sign-in server actions, and route protection via middleware.
declaration: I will set up Lucia Auth v3 for session-based authentication. Lucia gives you full control with no magic — just sessions, cookies, and your own database tables. If you prefer a hosted auth service (Clerk) or a broader OAuth library (Auth.js), say so before I begin.
